verificationSurfaces.command: docker build -t pnp-verify:local . && docker run pnp-verify:local npm run pnp:verify
GitHub Actions matrix: ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest

nonClaims: This status file does not activate public theorem emission.
This status file does not clear Release.UnrestrictedFinalSoundness or ExternalReview.Acceptance.
The theorem-binding ledger is currently a release-critical spine ledger and does not yet claim every numbered theorem environment is bound.
The report theorem inventory records the historical Section 22 theorem-ledger rows but does not yet claim every numbered theorem environment has been inventoried or checker-bound.
The report theorem coverage matrix maps every current Section 22 inventory row to explicit evidence surfaces, but does not yet claim every row has a complete direct checker binding.
The report theorem coverage closure plan maps every current coverage row to a future direct-checker-binding task, but does not complete those bindings.
The no-prose-only theorem policy forbids release-critical prose-only activation, but does not yet prove exhaustive historical theorem inventory coverage.
The proof obligation ledger records current obligations, dependencies, source files, tests, and computed hashes, but does not by itself discharge blocked final soundness.
The gap ledger records known unresolved, externally trusted, bounded-seed-only, and release-blocking gaps, but does not close them.
The finite-to-unbounded family audit represents the all-input-size uniformity question but does not prove all finite certificate schemas uniformly cover every SAT input size in polynomial time.
The checker-totality seed audit does not yet claim every historical checker has been fuzzed for totality.
The negative checker mutation suite is a seed suite and does not yet claim full generated mutation coverage.
The rule-family coverage ledger is a seed ledger and does not yet claim full historical rule-family coverage.
The checker dependency graph is a generated visualization and by itself does not prove absence of circular authority.
The checker no-circular-authority audit proves acyclicity only for declared authority edges, not all static import edges.
The NAND direct-wire semantics artifact is a seed executable semantics and does not yet claim full locked-NAND SAT-threshold coverage.
The NAND small-model audit is bounded to its configured universe and does not yet claim full locked-NAND SAT-threshold coverage.
The locked NAND SAT small-model audit is bounded to unit and contradiction CNF seeds and does not yet claim the full historical locked-NAND threshold theorem.
The complexity implication ledger is a seed ledger and does not yet discharge the full SAT-in-P to P=NP activation path.
The no-hidden-oracle audit is a seed source-surface scan and does not yet claim full semantic absence of every possible oracle pattern.
The fresh-clone verifier provides a reproducibility entrypoint but does not by itself activate the final theorem gate.
The container environment is a reproducibility entrypoint and is not yet a digest-pinned bit-for-bit environment proof.
The multi-platform CI matrix verifies a portable Node core subset and does not yet prove full bit-identical behavior across every operating system.
The determinism audit provides a replay harness and CI smoke comparison but does not yet prove full cross-platform byte-for-byte determinism.
The regeneration ledger records source files, commands, and output policies but does not by itself prove every artifact has been regenerated in every environment.
The release ladder records explicit status transitions but does not clear the current activation blockers.
The historical canonical report may be superseded by successor public-review reports, but this status file records the current non-activation boundary.
